From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1965 film by Alfonso Balcázar

| 4 Dollars of Revenge | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | * [Alfonso Balcázar](/wiki/Alfonso_Balc%C3%A1zar "Alfonso Balcázar") * Jaime Jesús Balcázar |
| Written by | * Jaime Jesús Balcázar * José Antonio de la Loma |
| Screenplay by | * [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") * [Aldo Grimaldi](/wiki/Aldo_Grimaldi "Aldo Grimaldi") * [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi") |
| Produced by | Alfonso Balcázar |
| Starring | * [Robert Woods](/wiki/Robert_Woods_(actor) "Robert Woods (actor)") * [Dana Ghia](/wiki/Dana_Ghia "Dana Ghia") * [Antonio Casas](/wiki/Antonio_Casas "Antonio Casas") * [Angelo Infanti](/wiki/Angelo_Infanti "Angelo Infanti") * [Gérard Tichy](/wiki/G%C3%A9rard_Tichy "Gérard Tichy") |
| Cinematography | * Víctor Monreal * Clemente Santoni |
| Edited by | Juan Luis Oliver |
| Music by | * [Benedetto Ghiglia](/wiki/Benedetto_Ghiglia "Benedetto Ghiglia") * [Angelo Francesco Lavagnino](/wiki/Angelo_Francesco_Lavagnino "Angelo Francesco Lavagnino") |
| Production companies | * Balcázar Producciones Cinematográficas * Compagnia Ambrosiana Cinematografica de Roma |
| Distributed by | * First Line Films * Morningstar Entertainment * Televista * Mill Creek Entertainment * SC Entertainment |
| Release date | * 5 March 1966 (1966-03-05) (Italy) |
| Running time | 89 min |
| Countries | * Spain * Italy |

***[4](/wiki/400_metres "400 metres") Dollars of Revenge*** ([Spanish](/wiki/Spanish_language "Spanish language"): *Cuatro dólares de venganza*, [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *4 dollari di vendetta*) is a 1966 Spanish-Italian [action](/wiki/Action_film "Action film") [western film](/wiki/Western_film "Western film") directed by [Alfonso Balcázar](/wiki/Alfonso_Balc%C3%A1zar "Alfonso Balcázar") and Jaime Jesús Balcázar, written by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"), [Aldo Grimaldi](/wiki/Aldo_Grimaldi "Aldo Grimaldi") and [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi") and starring [Robert Woods](/wiki/Robert_Woods_(actor) "Robert Woods (actor)"), [Dana Ghia](/wiki/Dana_Ghia "Dana Ghia"), [Antonio Casas](/wiki/Antonio_Casas "Antonio Casas"), [Angelo Infanti](/wiki/Angelo_Infanti "Angelo Infanti") and [Gérard Tichy](/wiki/G%C3%A9rard_Tichy "Gérard Tichy").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=4_Dollars_of_Revenge&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Robert Woods](/wiki/Robert_Woods_(actor) "Robert Woods (actor)") as Roy Dexter
* [Dana Ghia](/wiki/Dana_Ghia "Dana Ghia") as Mercedes
* [Angelo Infanti](/wiki/Angelo_Infanti "Angelo Infanti") as Barry Haller
* [Antonio Casas](/wiki/Antonio_Casas "Antonio Casas") as Colonel Jackson
* [José Manuel Martín](/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Manuel_Mart%C3%ADn "José Manuel Martín") as Manuel de Losa
* [Gérard Tichy](/wiki/G%C3%A9rard_Tichy "Gérard Tichy") as Clifford
* Tomás Torres as Pedro
* [Giulio Maculani](/wiki/Giulio_Maculani "Giulio Maculani") as Sheriff
* [Antonio Molino Rojo](/wiki/Antonio_Molino_Rojo "Antonio Molino Rojo") as Dave Griffith
* [Osvaldo Genazzani](/wiki/Osvaldo_Genazzani "Osvaldo Genazzani") as Secretario de Hamilton
* Gardenia Polito
* Lucio Rosato
* [Renato Baldini](/wiki/Renato_Baldini "Renato Baldini")
* Eleonora Bianchi
* Gianluigi Crescenzi
* Miguel de la Riva as Abogado defensor
* Robert Hoot
* [Ángel Lombarte](/wiki/%C3%81ngel_Lombarte "Ángel Lombarte") as Ayudante del Sheriff
* Francisco Nieto as Propietario de la tienda
* Luis del Pueblo as Thompson
* [Gustavo Re](/wiki/Gustavo_Re "Gustavo Re")
* Juan Torres as Mexicano
* Sergio Doré as Presidente del Tribunal
* Carlos Ronda as Señor Spencer
